response.justification: Bogdan is a highly experienced polyglot engineer with demonstrated Staff-level leadership and recent, highly relevant experience in AI-agent infrastructure and Model Context Protocol (MCP) tooling. He possesses a strong background in high-throughput distributed systems, having built microservices handling millions of requests per second. While he lacks the explicitly required Python experience, his extensive background in mastering diverse languages (DLang, C++, Java, TS) and his deep alignment with the AI-native engineering mindset make him a compelling candidate who can likely bridge the language gap quickly.
strengths: Direct, hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators.
Proven expertise in high-throughput distributed systems, handling millions of requests per second.
Demonstrated Staff-level technical leadership and ownership, including founding an open-source platform.
concerns: Lacks the 'Strong Python' experience explicitly required in the job description.
Heavy reliance on niche languages like DLang in past high-performance roles rather than mainstream enterprise stacks.
Some shorter tenures in past roles, though his recent positions show much better stability.
